name: list_directory
description: List files and directories in a path. This is the PRIMARY and RECOMMENDED method for exploring directory contents - always use this instead of 'run_shell' with 'ls', 'find', or similar commands when you need to see what files and folders exist. This tool is purpose-built for safe, efficient directory listing without invoking a shell. Always prefer this tool over shell-based alternatives.

path.description: The directory path to list. Use this to discover what files and subdirectories exist at a given location.
